title.en: Ye Tian came to the eighth layer.

content.en:
Burst!

A spear pierced towards Ye Tian's hole, the void was directly pierced, and even one of Ye Tian's defensive eternal skills could not resist, this spear pierced Ye Tian's body directly, but at the critical moment, Ye Tian used the legendary defensive eternal technique - the Eternal Wall.

This spear attacked on the Eternal Wall, which was canceled out by most of the attack power, and Ye Tian used the legendary eternal technique of the void state, the Void True Body, so that he was not injured.

"Will Eternal Technique, this Eternal Technique contains a large amount of will power, as well as a part of the Eternal Power and the power of the Innate Eternal Rules, and many will eternal techniques born after the combination of willpower attacks!"

Ye Tian had heard of the Will Eternal Technique, but it belonged to the legendary Eternal Technique, and he had never heard of someone creating the Will Eternal Technique.

Although many Eternal Realms have studied a lot of will and developed a lot of will secret techniques, they are only secret techniques, not eternal techniques, and their power is not comparable to that of non-eternal techniques.

The ordinary Will Eternal Technique has surpassed the ordinary top Eternal Skill in terms of threat, and is even second only to the Legendary Eternal Skill, after all, the Eternal Realm of the Space-Time Territory really has no particularly good way to deal with the Will Eternal Technique.

Puff puff!!!

One by one, the spears made of the Will Eternal Technique pierced towards Ye Tian, Ye Tian continued to resist these Will Eternal Techniques, and used legendary Eternal Skills such as the Eternal Pole Dao Fist to ~ counterattack.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian and these three Immortal Realm Lords continued to fight, and it took a lot of time to defeat them one by one.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian came to the eighth layer.

The three Eternal Realm Lords of the eighth layer were not Immortal Realm, but Immortal Realm, and they had all mastered the means of the Will Eternal Technique.

This battle lasted for many years, and Ye Tiancai defeated the three Immortal Realm Lords, and he was not lightly injured.

Finally, Ye Tian also came to the ninth layer.

"The Stargazing Sword Ancestor has only passed the ninth layer, I'm afraid I won't be able to break through the ninth layer!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Sure enough.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to be beaten by the three Eternal Realms of the ninth layer, even though his life-preserving ability was strong, his Endless Eternals didn't have much effect on his life-preserving ability when it was against the will attack.

When he was seriously injured, he was judged a failure by the True Nothing Legend Tower and was removed.

So far, Ye Tian's current record is the eighth layer of the True Legend Tower.

The first five floors of the True Legend Tower, each time you break through one floor, you can get a cultivation time of the True Legend Land. From the sixth layer to the tenth layer, every time you break through one layer, you can obtain the cultivation and enlightenment time of the five tribulations of the Void Legend.

Now, Ye Tian had broken through the eighth layer and obtained 20 Tribulation Yuan cultivation time. As soon as the tower ended, Ye Tian was very interested in this True Legend Land, so he let the True Legend Tower teleport himself to the True Legend Land.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye's body disappeared, and he instantly came to a mysterious void - the land of no legend. awn

......

"Come in!"

Ye Tian entered the True Legends Land, and the first time he entered, he felt the extraordinaryness here.

There is a special volitional energy that is constantly fusing his body with his will.

In the distance, a majestic sacred tree sits there.

Ye Tian wanted to fly towards this holy tree, but after flying for a long time, he still couldn't fly to the location of the holy tree, and he didn't fly too far, as if there was a problem with the distance of this void.

Abrupt.

A voice reached his ears.

"No need to try, no one can touch this True Dao Scar Tree, even the six Legendary Lords have tried, no matter how they fly, they can't fly over, we even doubt that this True Dao Scar Tree really exists. But in any case, when we cultivate here, we can indeed accelerate the fusion of the will and the body. "

The one who was summoned to Ye Tian was an Immortal Realm.

"Thank you for the reminder!"

Ye Tian thanked.

The other party didn't say much, but continued to cultivate.

So, Ye Tian found a place at random and began to retreat and cultivate.

Compared with other Eternal Realms that have entered here, Ye Tian's only advantage is that he can constantly use clones to verify the fusion of will and body, so the effect and speed of fusion are definitely much faster than those of other Eternal Realms.

In the following days, Ye Tian worked hard to study the fusion of will and body, so that he would not waste this opportunity.

Time passed slowly, and one catastrophe after another passed.

In the True Legends Land, there are not many Eternal Realms, after all, many Eternal Realms above the Immortal Realm have almost used up their cultivation time, and it is too difficult to improve their strength and break through one more level.

Therefore, there are usually not a few Eternal Realms here, and unconsciously, a few more Eternal Realms have left here, leaving only three Eternal Realms and Ye Tian, the half-step Eternal Realm of the Nine Extremes Realm, who is still here to comprehend and cultivate.

Finally, the other Eternal Realms left, leaving only Ye Tian alone, and it wasn't until a few more Tribulations had passed that two more Eternal Realms came.

"It's time!"

Ye Tian opened his eyes, and in the blink of an eye, he moved him out without legend.

However, Ye Tian did not leave the True Legend Tower, but prepared to continue to break into the tower.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the ninth layer of the True Legend Tower, and this time he had a lot of confidence that he would be able to break through the ninth layer of the True Legend Tower.

......... ，コ0

Bang!!!

Ye Tian fought with the three Eternal Realms on the ninth layer of the True Legend Tower, showing a far more powerful strength than before.

In these twenty tribulations of true and unlegendary cultivation, Ye Tian's degree of fusion with his will and body has soared a lot, before he only reached one ten-thousandth of the fusion degree, but now it is close to one percent.

In terms of the degree of fusion between the will and the body, I am afraid that even the Stargazing Sword Ancestor is not as good as him.

If he comprehends the five more eons, he will hopefully increase the degree of integration of his body and will to more than 10%.

In that case, if he chooses to break through to the Eternal Realm, his cultivation will immediately break through to the Immortal Realm.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian showed a powerful legendary eternal technique, no matter how powerful the opponent's will eternal technique was, he couldn't beat him.

The increase in the degree of fusion between his will and his body made his own physical strength reach an unbelievable level, and even the half-step eternal power skyrocketed.

Therefore, he was completely beating these three Eternal Realms.

"Eternal Extreme Dao Fist!"

Ye Tian smashed the body of an Eternal Realm with a punch, and the other party immediately collapsed.

After that, he quickly dealt with the other two Eternal Realms and broke through the ninth layer.

Then, Ye Tian wanted to break through the tenth layer, but his strength was still slightly worse, resulting in a failure to break through.

Ye Tian felt that if he wanted to break through the tenth layer, he was afraid that he would need to raise his will and body to more than one percent, and usher in a small transformation before he could hope to break through the tenth layer.

After breaking through the tenth layer and coming out, Ye Tian immediately entered the True Legend Ground Work again. _
